articles.title: June 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to September 01, 2013
articles.excerpt: June 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 01, 2013; EB-3 India to December 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: June 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 01, 2013; EB-3 India to December 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
